framework.name: OAuth 2.0 + OIDC Extension for Agent Delegation
framework.description: Extends OAuth 2.0 and OpenID Connect with agent-specific credentials and metadata for authenticated delegation. Explicitly builds on existing IAM rather than replacing it, but acknowledges OAuth alone doesn't solve hop-2+.
framework.raw_quote: extending OAuth 2.0 and OpenID Connect with agent-specific credentials and metadata, maintaining compatibility with established authentication and web infrastructure

source.title: Authenticated Delegation and Authorized AI Agents - arXiv
